title: Aggressive Growth Sprint — Day 5 Report: 404 Emergency + Click Extraction (Phase 13C.6)

executive_summary.critical_finding: ZERO real 404 errors. All 12 tracked '404' URLs were either intentional Phase 2 removals (4) or tracking bugs with wrong slugs (8). No pages need restoration. No redirects needed.
executive_summary.manual_indexing: 7/7 Day-4 fixed pages VERIFIED and ready for Qasem to manually Request Indexing in GSC UI
executive_summary.tracking_fixes: 5 slug corrections applied to tracker (4 guide slugs, 1 blog slug)

breakdown.geo_pages_removed: 3 (nashville-tn, reno-nv, philadelphia-pa) — Phase 2 V2 geo prune
breakdown.blog_slugs_wrong: 2 (best-compound-interest-calculator-guide never existed; how-much-emergency-fund is a DECISION page not blog)
breakdown.policy_page_noindex: 1 (cookies — intentionally noindex, should not be in tracker)

task2_fix_404.result: NO-OP — zero real 404 errors to fix

pages: blog/20000-loan... — HTTP 200, index,follow, self-canonical, in sitemap ✅
blog/fed-2025-report... — HTTP 200, index,follow, self-canonical, in sitemap ✅
blog/mortgage-rates-2025... — HTTP 200, index,follow, self-canonical, in sitemap ✅
task3_manual_indexing_verification.manual_indexing_instructions: Qasem: Open GSC → URL Inspection → paste each URL → Request Indexing. Prioritize HIGHEST first (20000-loan). Do NOT use Indexing API.

task4_pinterest.details: 2 pins live. First meaningful analytics window (72h+). Qasem should check pinterest.com native analytics. GA4 UTM: 0 sessions.

task5_ctr_continuation.result: ✅ 5 tracking corrections + 2 CTR fixes + 3 internal links
task5_ctr_continuation.details: Guide slugs corrected (4), blog slug corrected (1). CTR fixes on mortgage-rates-today full slug + emergency-fund decision page route fix. 3 internal links added.

task6_dashboard_307.details: 3 auth-gated dashboard URLs (307 redirect). Deferred to next sitemap maintenance — not urgent (0.46% of sitemap).

task7_technical_cleanup.details: 4 corrected guide URLs verified HTTP 200. Sitemaps: 651 main + 97 news. All 12 '404' URLs diagnosed and resolved.

task8_deploy.details: Git push → GitHub auto-deploy. 12/12 key URLs verified. Main + news sitemaps submitted.

biggest_blocker.previous: CTR at 0.2% — titles/metas not optimized for clicks
biggest_blocker.day5_resolution: 404 investigation complete — no real errors found. 7 pages cleared for manual indexing. Tracking corrected.
biggest_blocker.current_blocker: Position depth — 8/12 pages rank 11+. CTR improvements applied (Days 4-5) need re-crawl to take effect. Manual indexing will speed this up.
biggest_blocker.ctr_improvement_expected: Within 7-14 days after Google re-crawls the 7 fixed pages

recommended_day6_actions: Qasem: Manually Request Indexing for the 7 verified pages in GSC UI (priority order in manual-indexing-candidates-day5.json)
Monitor GSC for CTR changes over next 7 days (titles/metas need re-crawl)
Check Pinterest native analytics — 84h milestone reached
No new page changes needed — let Day 4-5 fixes settle and get re-crawled
Consider 1 high-quality blog post only if a strong GSC query opportunity appears
Remove 3 dashboard URLs from sitemap.ts in next maintenance pass

phase_13c_cumulative.sprint_status: Day 5 complete — 404 emergency cleared. Click extraction deployed. Manual indexing queued.
